rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Binding Arbitration &Amp; Appoint A Neutral Arbitrator

DEFENDANTS HAROLD GOLDMAN, ZELDA GOLDMAN'S Petition To Compel Binding Arbitration, Appoint A Neutral Arbitrator. GRANTED. Cross-complaints shall proceed to binding arbitration.
